items.title: Spinner Parkinson signs Durham deal extension
items.summary: Left-arm spin bowler Callum Parkinson will spend a fourth season with Durham after signing a one-year contract extension.

items.title: The numbers behind Spain defence chasing World Cup history
items.summary: With Spain yet to concede at the 2026 World Cup and on the brink of another tournament record, BBC Sport examines the numbers behind the shutouts.
